mano_cua.result_summary: 选择下拉项后输入框未自动获得焦点（focusAfterSelect 默认 false 且无 true 的 demo）。实测：选择 California 后输入 test 无响应，document.activeElement 为 BODY。DevTools Console 出现 TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'focus')。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Issues panel is now closed and the DevTools console has more space. Console shows: 1. document.querySelector('#typeahead-0').focus() → Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'focus'); 2. document.activeElement.tagName + ' id=' + document.activeElement.id → 'BODY id=' — confirming focus lost after selection.
